ai-dev-tools.name: Replit Agent
ai-dev-tools.description: Cloud IDE agent that plans, builds, tests, and deploys full applications from a natural-language prompt.

ai-dev-tools.name: Bolt.new
ai-dev-tools.description: StackBlitz's in-browser AI app builder that generates and runs full-stack web apps in a WebContainer.

ai-dev-tools.name: Lovable
ai-dev-tools.description: Prompt-to-app builder that generates production React front-ends with Supabase-backed data and auth.

ai-dev-tools.name: v0
ai-dev-tools.description: Vercel's generative UI tool that turns prompts into React and Tailwind components and full pages.

ai-dev-tools.name: Devin
ai-dev-tools.description: Cognition's autonomous software engineer agent that takes tickets and works tasks end to end in its own sandbox.

ai-dev-tools.name: Augment Code
ai-dev-tools.description: Codebase-aware AI assistant and agent built around a large real-time context engine for big repositories.

ai-dev-tools.name: Amazon Q Developer
ai-dev-tools.description: AWS's AI coding assistant with inline completions, agents, and deep AWS service integration.

ai-dev-tools.name: Gemini Code Assist
ai-dev-tools.description: Google's AI coding assistant for IDEs and the cloud, backed by Gemini models and a generous free tier.

ai-dev-tools.name: JetBrains Junie
ai-dev-tools.description: JetBrains' coding agent that uses the IDE's program structure model to plan and execute multi-file tasks.

ai-dev-tools.name: Qodo
ai-dev-tools.description: Code-integrity platform focused on AI-generated tests, PR review, and quality verification.

ai-dev-tools.name: Zed
ai-dev-tools.description: Rust-built high-performance editor with collaborative editing and built-in AI agentic editing.

ai-dev-tools.name: Roo Code
ai-dev-tools.description: Open-source autonomous coding agent for VS Code with multiple modes and bring-your-own-model support.

ai-dev-tools.name: OpenCode
ai-dev-tools.description: Open-source terminal-native coding agent that works with any model provider.

ai-dev-tools.name: Gemini CLI
ai-dev-tools.description: Google's open-source terminal AI agent for coding and automation with a large free tier.

ai-dev-tools.name: OpenAI Codex
ai-dev-tools.description: OpenAI's cloud and CLI coding agent that runs tasks in sandboxes and ships changes via PRs.

llm-models.name: GPT-5 mini
llm-models.description: OpenAI's smaller, faster GPT-5 variant tuned for cost-sensitive, high-throughput workloads.

llm-models.name: gpt-oss
llm-models.description: OpenAI's open-weight reasoning model family released under Apache 2.0 for local and self-hosted use.

llm-models.name: OpenAI o3
llm-models.description: OpenAI's deep-reasoning model line trained to think longer on hard math, science, and coding problems.

llm-models.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
llm-models.description: Google's fast, low-cost multimodal model with a one-million-token context window.

llm-models.name: DeepSeek V3
llm-models.description: DeepSeek's open-weight mixture-of-experts chat model offering frontier quality at low cost.

llm-models.name: Kimi K2
llm-models.description: Moonshot AI's trillion-parameter open-weight mixture-of-experts model built for agentic and coding tasks.

llm-models.name: GLM
llm-models.description: Z.ai's open-weight GLM model family with strong coding and agentic performance at low cost.

llm-models.name: MiniMax M2
llm-models.description: MiniMax's open-weight model emphasizing coding, agentic tool use, and very long context.

llm-models.name: Gemma
llm-models.description: Google's open-weight lightweight model family derived from the same research as Gemini.

llm-models.name: Phi
llm-models.description: Microsoft's open-weight small-language-model family trained on high-quality data for strong reasoning per size.

llm-models.name: Cohere Command A
llm-models.description: Cohere's enterprise-focused model optimized for RAG, tool use, and multilingual business workloads.

llm-models.name: Amazon Nova
llm-models.description: Amazon's multimodal model family on Bedrock spanning fast, balanced, and high-capability tiers.

llm-models.name: Mistral Small
llm-models.description: Mistral's open-weight small model balancing capable reasoning with efficient local deployment.

llm-gateways.name: TrueFoundry AI Gateway
llm-gateways.description: Enterprise AI gateway unifying routing, governance, observability, and access control across many providers.

llm-gateways.name: Eden AI
llm-gateways.description: Unified API across LLMs and specialized AI services like OCR, speech, and translation with cost routing.

llm-gateways.name: Unify
llm-gateways.description: LLMOps platform that benchmarks and routes requests to the best model on quality, speed, and cost.

llm-gateways.name: Martian
llm-gateways.description: Model router that forwards each request to the most suitable LLM with cost ceilings and automatic failover.

llm-gateways.name: Requesty
llm-gateways.description: AI gateway in front of 400+ providers offering intelligent routing, fallbacks, caching, and governance.

llm-gateways.name: LangDB
llm-gateways.description: Open-source high-performance API gateway for managing and monitoring LLM traffic at scale.

llm-gateways.name: Amazon Bedrock
llm-gateways.description: AWS's managed service exposing many foundation models behind one API with governance and guardrails.

llm-gateways.name: Together AI
llm-gateways.description: Inference platform serving 100+ open-weight models behind an OpenAI-compatible API with fine-tuning.

llm-gateways.name: Fireworks AI
llm-gateways.description: Fast inference gateway for open and proprietary models with an OpenAI-compatible API and fine-tuning.

llm-gateways.name: Langfuse
llm-gateways.description: Open-source LLM observability and tracing platform with prompt management and evals.

llm-gateways.name: GroqCloud
llm-gateways.description: Inference gateway running open-weight models on custom LPUs for extremely low-latency, OpenAI-compatible calls.

image-generation.name: GPT Image
image-generation.description: OpenAI's natively multimodal image model with strong instruction following, available via the Images API.

image-generation.name: Nano Banana
image-generation.description: Google's Gemini-native image generation and editing model known for character consistency and edits.

image-generation.name: Seedream
image-generation.description: ByteDance Seed's high-resolution text-to-image and editing model with strong photorealism.

image-generation.name: Qwen-Image
image-generation.description: Alibaba's open-weight image model with best-in-class multilingual in-image text rendering.

image-generation.name: Reve
image-generation.description: Image generation and editing tool with strong prompt adherence and natural-language editing.

image-generation.name: Adobe Firefly
image-generation.description: Adobe's commercially-safe generative image model integrated across Creative Cloud and a web studio.

image-generation.name: Krea
image-generation.description: Creative suite with real-time generation, editing, and access to many image and video models.

image-generation.name: Freepik AI
image-generation.description: AI creative platform aggregating many image and video models alongside a large stock asset library.

image-generation.name: Playground
image-generation.description: Image generation platform with graphic-design-oriented models and editing tools for creators.

image-generation.name: fal
image-generation.description: Generative media inference platform serving fast hosted image and video models via API.

image-generation.name: ComfyUI
image-generation.description: Open-source node-based interface for building custom diffusion pipelines with maximal control.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: AutoGen (AG2)
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Open-source multi-agent conversation framework, originally from Microsoft Research, now developed as AG2.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: Semantic Kernel
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Microsoft's enterprise agent SDK with first-class C#/.NET support, plugins, and Azure integration.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: Google ADK
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Google's Agent Development Kit for hierarchical multi-agent systems with native A2A and Vertex AI integration.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: Strands Agents
ai-agent-frameworks.description: AWS's open-source model-driven agent SDK for Python and TypeScript with built-in observability.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: smolagents
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Hugging Face's minimalist library for code-writing agents in just a few lines of Python.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: Haystack
ai-agent-frameworks.description: deepset's open-source orchestration framework for production RAG pipelines and tool-using agents.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: DSPy
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Stanford's framework for programming and optimizing LLM pipelines via declarative modules instead of prompts.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: Atomic Agents
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Lightweight Python framework for building agents from composable, schema-driven atomic components.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: AutoGPT
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Open-source platform for building, deploying, and running continuous autonomous AI agents.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: Letta
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Open-source framework for stateful agents with long-term memory, evolved from the MemGPT project.

ai-agent-frameworks.name: PocketFlow
ai-agent-frameworks.description: Minimalist 100-line LLM framework that models agents and workflows as a simple nested graph.
